case_title: JOSE SOTO ORTEGA VS. HIPOLITO ESPINOZA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ALPHA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, JOSE SOTO AS TO DEFENDANT HIPOLITO ESPINOZA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ALPHA CONSTRUCTION CO.
